About

A story of passion and purpose

"With a strong drive to make a positive change in the world."

Asita Darusalam Rahardja is a graduating senior at Kolese Kanisius Jakarta — one of Indonesia's most prestigious Jesuit schools. Known for academic excellence and extraordinary leadership, Asita carries a remarkable record spanning debate championships, international MUN diplomacy, environmental advocacy, and community impact across Jakarta and beyond.

Having been recognized as Valedictorian from junior high, holding Summa Cum Laude honors throughout senior high, and founding multiple organizations — from CaniMUNDO to CANVAS SDGs — Asita represents a generation of Indonesian youth determined to lead with both intellect and heart.

PsychologyPhilosophy DebateModel UN SDGsBiology ChemistrySilat ChoirChess
Education

A decade of excellence

From elementary salutatorian to high school valedictorian — a consistent pursuit of the highest academic and personal standards.

2023 – 2026 (Current)
Canisius College Senior High
Current Grade: 94.46 · Summa Cum Laude · Top 10% of Class (out of 287) · Top 2% Non-Academics

Taking advanced coursework in Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Economics, Accountancy, and Civics while simultaneously leading CaniMUNDO, co-founding CANVAS SDGs, founding CCMUN 2025, and serving as a voice in multiple debate and leadership organizations.

Summa Cum LaudeSecretary General MUN CANVAS Co-FounderAdvanced SciencesTenor, Choir
2020 – 2023
Canisius College Junior High
Final Grade: 93.87 · Valedictorian of 182 Students

Achieved Summa Cum Laude for 5 consecutive semesters and Man of Class for 4 semesters. Authored an award-winning research paper analyzing Tere Liye's novel through the lens of Ignatian values. Co-founded the Canisius Community of Nature (CCON).

ValedictorianSumma Cum Laude ×5 Student CouncilBest Research PaperCCON Co-Founder
2014 – 2020
Kupu-Kupu Elementary School
Final Grade: 94.39 / 100 · Salutatorian of 24 Students

Awarded Best Teamworking Student and Best Academics. Led the Chess Club as President and directed the School Cinematography Club — demonstrating early creative and leadership instincts.

SalutatorianChess President RoboticsCinematography Director
